title: sedum rosea var. frigidum
intro: Sedum rosea var. frigidum, also known as Ice Plant or Living Rock, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sedum rosea var. frigidum include reducing inflammation, promoting tissue repair, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
